name: RFISI: Internal Communication with a Malware URL
notes: This rule will notify when an internal client loads a URL that is known to host malware. This can often be more accurate than Malware host detection by IP. See https://ibm.biz/rfisi_threat_intel
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Remote
when any of URL (custom) are contained in any of Malware URLs - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), XFE ATPF-mw_url - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY RFISI: Internal Communication with a Malware URL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Remote
AND when any of URL (custom) are contained in any of Malware URLs - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), XFE ATPF-mw_url - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: RFISI: Internal Communication with a Malware URL
Event description: An internal client has loaded a web URL known to host malware.
